prompt: The app already uses BarcodeCapture for scanning barcodes. Now add an ID scanning screen using IdCapture. Make sure the two modes don't interfere — the ID scanning screen should handle mode co-existence correctly.

assertions.text: Addresses the BarcodeCapture/IdCapture co-existence concern — either calls context.removeCurrentMode() or context.removeAllModes() when switching modes, OR explicitly notes that simultaneous co-existence is intentional
Sets up IdCaptureSettings with acceptedDocuments and scanner
Implements IdCaptureListener with didCapture and didReject
Manages camera lifecycle in viewWillAppear / viewDidDisappear
